Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Thank you, Kurosawa-san. I'll be taking this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Oh, these are the guys I was talking about earlier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}This is Officer Kurosawa. He helps keep our squad well-equipped.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oh, and here. This is from Ikutsuki-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Whoa, is that our war funds? Ya shouldn't have![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message labels. [n]{f 1 5 0}*If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You can't fight empty-handed, so find something you like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Kurosawa-san has connections... He can secure equipment for us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}Of course they do. Nothing in life is free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}My job is to maintain peace in this city, regardless of the circumstances.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}I'm just an ordinary police officer, but it doesn't take a genius to know something strange is going on here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}I'm only doing what I think is right. Nothing more.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}If you need something, we can talk in the back.[n]{f 1 1}
